hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; case "$f" in src/styles/*.css|src/styles/**/*.css) npx stylelint "$f" ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; case "$f" in src/*|site/*) if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(css|md|html|njk)$'; then node ./scripts/check-violations.js "$f"; fi ;; esac; }
